name: Potato Salad with Cilantro Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds red potatoes, cut into 2-inch pieces
1 yellow bell pepper, roasted, peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray both potatoes and interior of a 15x10-inch jelly roll pan with cooking spray. Sprinkle garlic over potatoes and season to taste with sea salt and cracked black pepper.
2. Arrange potatoes in a single layer on the prepared pan. Roast at 475°F until fork tender and well browned, about 40 minutes. Turn potatoes several times during cooking to prevent sticking. Let cool to room temperature and transfer to a bowl.
3. Add roasted bell pepper, green onions, and tomatoes to the cooled potatoes. Toss together.
4. Combine vinegar, sugar, olive oil, chicken broth, and lemon juice in a small bowl. Stir in cilantro and pour dressing over vegetables. Toss to combine.
5. Remove any tough stems from arugula, break up large leaves, and stir into salad.
6. Makes 9 cups. Each 1-cup serving contains 130 calories with 7% fat, 56 mg sodium, 0 cholesterol, 1 gram fat, 27 grams carbohydrates, 4 grams protein, and 0.90 gram fiber.
